method: controlled keyword projection from expert material into normalized capability registry
boundary: This is provenance for a controlled task family. It is artifact-backed, but it is not a claim of open-world expert-material induction.

steps.note: Scenario-conditioned expert note is loaded as the source of distillation.
Candidate capabilities are projected from expert clauses before normalization.
Candidates are normalized to shared capability ids reused by execution, verifier, and repair.
Compact v1 selects a subset of capabilities for the first execution attempt.
Posterior feedback determines whether evolution is needed.
Typed repair updates capability coverage, boundary logic, or output contract.
